Experience

My professional journey and key contributions

  • Jan 2023 – Present

    AI/ML & Python Engineer BJS Home Delivery

    Key Achievements:

    • Built self-hosted LLM platform (vLLM, Ollama, PyTorch, Chroma) with SSO & RBAC for secure AI access
    • Fine-tuned LLMs for domain-specific use cases, improving accuracy and task automation
    • Deployed GPU workloads on Kubernetes/on-prem, enabling scalable ML & LLM inference
    • Developed price prediction models; automated distributed training & deployment using Ray
    • Integrated AI workflows into legacy & new apps, including route optimization and delivery proof generation
    • Modernized 5 legacy systems to v2; reduced API latency by 30%
    • Built Azure pipelines & custom images, enabling one-click deployment and reducing cloud costs by 27%

  • Oct 2021 – Nov 2022

    Software Engineer (Python Developer) Connoisseur Infotech

    Key Achievements:

    • Developed and optimized deep learning NLP models (BERT/Huggingface), improving F1 score from 71→91
    • Reduced inference time by 20% through model optimization
    • Built Python REST APIs using Flask and FastAPI for model deployment
    • Prepared and processed multilingual datasets for production-ready NLP solutions

  • Apr 2021 – Oct 2021

    Python Developer Extech Digital

    Key Achievements:

    • Developed Python-based backend solutions using Flask
    • Contributed to front-end integration and API development
